---
title: "About"
---

About this site

```{ojs}
THREE = import("https://esm.sh/three@0.163.0");
OrbitControls = import("https://esm.sh/three@0.163.0/examples/jsm/controls/OrbitControls.js");
OBJLoader  = import("https://esm.sh/three@0.163.0/addons/loaders/OBJLoader.js");
GLTFLoader  = import("https://esm.sh/three@0.163.0/addons/loaders/GLTFLoader.js");
DracoLoader = import("https://esm.sh/three@0.163.0/addons/loaders/DRACOLoader.js");


h = 600;
w = width; 

scene = {
  const THREE_Lib = await THREE;
  const { GLTFLoader: LoaderClass } = await GLTFLoader;
  const { DRACOLoader } = await DracoLoader;
  
  const s = new THREE_Lib.Scene();
  s.background = new THREE_Lib.Color(0x111111);

  const dracoLoader = new DRACOLoader();
  dracoLoader.setDecoderPath('draco/');
  
  const loader = new LoaderClass();
  loader.setDRACOLoader(dracoLoader);
  try {
    const gltf = await loader.loadAsync('shoe/shoe_clean.compressed.glb');
    
    const model = gltf.scene; 
    
    const box = new THREE_Lib.Box3().setFromObject(model);
    const size = box.getSize(new THREE_Lib.Vector3());
    
    const maxDim = Math.max(size.x, size.y, size.z);
    const scale = 2 / maxDim;
    model.scale.set(scale, scale, scale);

    box.setFromObject(model); 
    const center = box.getCenter(new THREE_Lib.Vector3());
    center.y -= 0.68;
    model.position.sub(center); 

    s.add(model);
  } catch (error) {
    console.error("Failed to load goat:", error);
  }

  const light = new THREE.DirectionalLight(0xffffff, 2);
  light.position.set(2, 2, 2);
  s.add(light);
  s.add(new THREE.AmbientLight(0xffffff, 0.5));
  
  // const geo = new THREE.BoxGeometry(1, 1, 1);
  // const mat = new THREE.MeshStandardMaterial({ color: 0x00AAff });
  // const mesh = new THREE.Mesh(geo, mat);
  // s.add(mesh);

  const size = 10;
  const divisions = 10;
  const gridHelper = new THREE.GridHelper( size, divisions );
  s.add( gridHelper );
  
  return s;
}

camera = new THREE.PerspectiveCamera(60, w / h, 0.1, 100);
{
  camera.position.set( 
1.5739010063256612
,1.0827573643662827
,-0.3759417303914232);
  camera.lookAt(0.5,0.85,-0);
}

renderer = {
  const r = new THREE.WebGLRenderer({ antialias: true });
  const controls = new OrbitControls.OrbitControls(camera, r.domElement);
  r.setSize(w, h);
  r.setPixelRatio(window.devicePixelRatio);
  return r;
}

{
  while (true) {
    // scene.children.forEach(child => {
    //   if(child.isMesh) child.rotation.z += 0.01;
    //   if(child.isMesh) child.rotation.y += 0.01;
    //   if(child.isMesh) child.rotation.x += 0.01;
    // });

    renderer.render(scene, camera);
    yield renderer.domElement;
  }
}

```
